title: Planned water outage: Loerie Park
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water outage for a portion of Loerie Park on Monday 9 February from 09:00 to 14:00.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water outage for a portion of Loerie Park on Monday 9 February from 09:00 to 14:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The following area will be affected:"},{"type":"list","items":["Van Kervel Street","Meyer Street"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Municipality is undertaking the replacement of a water valve on the corner of Van Kervel and Meyer Street. During the construction period, there may be temporary disruptions to municipal water services in the surrounding areas.","html":"George Municipality is undertaking the replacement of a water valve on the corner of Van Kervel and Meyer Street. During the construction period, there may be temporary disruptions to municipal water services in the surrounding areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Additionally, road users and pedestrians in Van Kervel and Meyer Street are advised to exercise caution and be mindful of construction activities. Flag personnel will be available to direct when necessary.","html":"Additionally, road users and pedestrians in Van Kervel and Meyer Street are advised to exercise caution and be mindful of construction activities. Flag personnel will be available to direct when necessary."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
